summary: Activity Feed Fix VERIFIED - All features working. The bug reported (activity feed not updating) was caused by the endpoint NOT querying the contact_events collection. Fix confirmed: GET /api/activity/{user_id} now queries contact_events as the PRIMARY data source. Frontend displays events with proper icons, colors, and real-time timestamps. 30-second auto-refresh is implemented.

activity_feed_returns_contact_events.details: GET /api/activity/{user_id}?limit=10 returns contact_events data (digital_card_shared, review_request_sent, showcase_shared, etc.)

new_events_appear_in_feed.details: POST /api/contacts/{userId}/find-or-create-and-log creates events that immediately appear in activity feed

event_icons_mapped_correctly.details: digital_card_shared=card (gold), review_request_sent=star (yellow), showcase_shared=storefront (green) - all verified in UI

timestamps_show_relative_time.details: UI shows 'Just now', '1m ago', '2m ago' for recent activities

30_second_auto_refresh_implemented.details: setInterval in home.tsx line 356 calls loadRecentActivity() every 30000ms (30 seconds)

verified_features: GET /api/activity/{user_id} queries contact_events collection as PRIMARY source (server.py line 337)
Activity feed displays: digital_card_shared, review_request_sent, showcase_shared, sms_sent, email_sent, etc.
Icon mapping in home.tsx getActivityIcon() (line 488-510) covers all event types
60-second timestamp refresh for relative time display (line 388)
POST /api/contacts/{userId}/find-or-create-and-log logs events that appear in feed
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix (server.py line 318-474): get_activity_feed() now queries contact_events with base_filter and limit, sorts by timestamp descending
Event type to message mapping (line 358-371): Proper human-readable messages like 'shared a digital card with', 'sent a review invite to'
Frontend auto-refresh (home.tsx line 354-358): useEffect with setInterval(30000) calls loadRecentActivity()
Icon fallback (home.tsx line 557-563): Uses item.icon from API response, falls back to getActivityIcon(item.type)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (activity feed displays correctly with proper icons and timestamps)

seed_data_creation: Created test contact events via POST /api/contacts/{userId}/find-or-create-and-log for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity feed fix verified. The endpoint GET /api/activity/{user_id} now returns contact_events data as primary source. Frontend displays events with proper icons (card, star, storefront, chatbubble, mail, etc.) and colors. 30-second auto-refresh is active.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending

rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: The original activity feed endpoint was only pulling from contacts, messages, tasks, and campaign_enrollments collections. The contact_events collection (where all user actions like sharing cards, review invites, emails are logged) was NOT being queried. Fix: Added contact_events query as the PRIMARY data source with proper icon/color/message mapping.
